confirm-close-description: Your changes may not be saved.
error-registering-passkey: There was an error registering your passkey
only-few-seconds: This will only take a few seconds
passkey-subtitle-suggestion: Want to sign in faster next time?
passkey-tab-instructions: We opened a new browser window on this device. Please follow the instructions in the other tab.
session-expired-reason: For security reasons, this link has timed out. You can start a new session.
try-again-close-this-window: Try adding it again later. You can close this window now.
try-again-later: You can try adding it again later.
unexpected-error-subtitle: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
webauthn-not-supported-suggestion: Your device doesn't support WebAuthn. Please update or switch to a compatible device.
you-can-close-this-window: You can close this window now.

notification.404-token-description: Please verify the provided token and try again.
notification.invalid-config-subtitle: It seems like the Verify with Footprint integration is using an invalid integration key. Please contact the owner of this product.
notification.invalid-domain-description: Sorry, you don't have permission to access this application. It seems that the domain associated with your account is not authorized. If you need assistance, feel free to contact technical support.
notification.invalid-kind-description: It looks like you're using a non-auth Playbook. Please review and rectify the settings.
